evidence_snippets: They walk past DIMITRI (18, big Native American guy) as they enter the store. Dimitri aggressively bumps his shoulder into
Evan is playfully throwing flour at a tiny Japanese boy. They both laugh hard.
The Japanese boy ties Evan's apron. Evan then turns around and ties the boy's apron. They both look happy.
Evan is standing by the sink scrubbing a tray. Behind him, at the table, is the small Japanese boy eating the tiramisu.
